summary: Replaced failed 24V contactor (CTR02266) and weak run capacitor on Trane XR14 4TTR4. Scope expanded from contactor-only to include preventive cap replacement. Unit tested — three clean cooling cycles, compressor amp draw nominal.

findings.issue: Failed 24V contactor — pitted contacts, open coil
Weak run capacitor — 40µF vs 45µF spec, replaced preventively
findings.notes: Cap still within functional range but degrading. Replaced while contactor was being swapped.

scope_changes.new_scope: Contactor replacement + preventive run capacitor replacement
scope_changes.reason: Run capacitor reads 40µF vs 45µF spec — 11% degraded, likely to fail within one cooling season
